CustomField.defaultValue: IF( ISPICKVAL($User.GWB_Region__c, 'NA'), 'NA', IF( ISPICKVAL($User.GWB_Region__c, 'EU'), 'EU', IF( ISPICKVAL($User.GWB_Region__c, 'SA'), 'SA', IF( ISPICKVAL($User.GWB_Region__c, 'SK'), 'SK', IF( ISPICKVAL($User.GWB_Region__c, 'AP'), 'AP', '' ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.description: Functional Description: GWB Region field for regional sharing Used in Integration: N Bi-Directional Sync: N User Story #: 4426226
CustomField.label: GWB Region
